# HireWilliam

> HireWilliam is an AI-powered sales automation platform built for founders. William — the AI — researches prospects, writes personalised outreach across email, LinkedIn, and Instagram, handles replies, and books meetings — while founders sleep.

## What HireWilliam Does

- Sends 40-50 personalised outreach messages per day across email, LinkedIn, and Instagram
- Researches each prospect individually (not templates)
- Handles replies and moves leads through the pipeline automatically
- Books qualified meetings directly into your calendar
- Operates 24/7 — founders wake up to booked calls, not to-do lists

## Who It's For

Early-stage founders, solo founders, and bootstrapped startups (2–4 person teams) who are spending 15–20 hours/week on manual sales outreach and need to free up time for product and fundraising.

## Pricing

- $299/month — everything included, cancel anytime
- No setup fee, no per-message fees, no annual contracts
- 30-day money-back guarantee if reply rate is below 5%

## Why Founders Choose HireWilliam Over Hiring an SDR

- 94% cheaper than a junior SDR ($299/month vs $5,200+/month)
- Productive in 24 hours vs 3 months ramp time
- Never calls in sick, never quits, works 24/7
- Genuine personalisation — references real prospect activity (LinkedIn posts, Product Hunt launches, changelogs)

## Key Stats

- Average: 8–12 qualified meetings per week
- Reply rate: 10–15% (vs 2% for generic outreach)
- 32–48 prospect conversations per month
- Time saved: 8–12 hours/week for the founder

## Founder

Built by Terry Lee Morgan. Contact: terrylee@hirewilliam.com
